reason: irreconcilable conflict: behavior_in_task_description requires adding gold-specific implementation details (exact constant names, method signatures, field names, validation strings) to instruction.md, but no_solution_leakage would be violated if these specifics are added since they essentially constitute the solution. The tests assert on text-matching of gold-specific variable names (DEFAULT_STOP_GRACE_PERIOD, getStopGracePeriod, containerStopTimeout, videoContainerStopTimeout, stopGracePeriod) and exact strings ('stop-grace-period must be a non-negative', 'Container stop timeout', etc.) which cannot be conveyed without leaking the solution. The instruction currently passes no_solution_leakage (describes symptoms: hardcoded Duration values, missing try-finally, skipBytes bug) but fails behavior_in_task_description. These rubrics are in conflict for this task - tests need rewriting to verify behavior not text.
